resultList.dtldesc: ETA Star Rosedale is a luxury residential project located in Padur, Chennai, that offers a perfect blend of modern architecture and traditional design. This exquisite architecture, top-notch amenities, and superior construction quality make it the perfect destination for those seeking a comfortable and stylish lifestyle are all set for your grabs. Property Specifications Meticulously designed, this truly lavish and stunning flat facing the south direction is 100 Vastu-compliant where you can experience happiness, life, utmost joy, and abundance. Showcasing a well-ventilated and naturally bright ambience to dwell in, this property located on the 2nd floor of a 13-storeyed apartment welcomes you to a dust and noise-free property. To describe, this lovely flat comprises 2 good-sized bedrooms that are adorned with modern wardrobes where you can accommodate your belongings. With a provision to install geysers are 2 western-style attached bathrooms for personal use. Apart from the above, there is also a living cum dining area and 3 gorgeous balconies, of which one balcony is linked to the hall and the other 2 balconies rendering a delightful view of the pool are connected to the bedrooms. Explore your cooking skills in the modular kitchen which is equipped with a branded chimney that vents the fumes. Moreover, there is also a polished granite platform, a stainless steel sink, fancy cabinets, and a piped gas connection. Facilities To ensure a comfortable lifestyle there are a handful of modern facilities offered at this apartment that include, a covered parking space for one vehicle, 24-hour water supply, 100 power backup, a security guard, CCTV cameras, 2 lifts, a swimming pool, flower gardens, an indoor games room, a kids play area, outdoor tennis courts, and a retail boulevard with retail shops.Locality ETA Star Rosedale is a prestigious residential property which lies just opposite the prominent Hindustan University and is merely 2km away from the Siruseri IT Park which is an added benefit. Within the sensible limits of only 3km of this property are a handful of prominent schools, well-known hospitals, famous shopping malls, and supermarkets. Moreover, there are several leading nationalized as well as private sector banks as well as ATMs in the vicinity. The flat offers a beautiful view of the lake and is well-connected with public transportation to the major parts of the city. Commuting from one place to another is also easy as the Velachery Railway Station is within 15km, which makes connecting to prime destinations like Sholinganallur at 12km away and Kilambakkam 2km away, even easier.
